creator: pauamma@gundo.com
text:
(In reply to Li-Wen Hsu from comment #3)

There's a survey email, visible (if you haven't received it) at https://lists.freebsd.org/archives/freebsd-announce/2022-April/000029.html and https://lists.freebsd.org/archives/freebsd-doc/2022-April/001677.html. In that context, I mean "counterproductive" as "would make the whole FreeBSD Handbook less useful to some" (which removing NIS documentation definitely qualifies as if sites/people still use it).
